title: state tables export (JSON + HTML)
manager: Export a machine's transition table as structured JSON and as rendered HTML — the tabular counterpart to the diagram, for readers who want to scan rows or feed the structure to another tool. Some audiences read tables faster than graphs, and the JSON form makes the machine's structure programmatically consumable.
cs: folds fsl#513 (state tables as HTML); JSON is the data form, HTML the human form
